h2:
The records are there —

but the interpretation is still scattered

scene1.stageAriaLabel: Scattered materials being connected into one person's case
scene1.title: When you need to tie scattered notes and results into one story
scene1.quote:
"When assessment results and session notes don't talk to each other,

pulling them into a single story is the hardest part."

scene2.stageAriaLabel: A mountain of documents piling up after a session
scene2.title:
When you have to write

the same thing all over again
scene2.quote:
"Re-documenting the same session across every form

keeps pushing my end-of-day later and later."

scene3.stageAriaLabel: Records remain but the thread to continue the next session gets tangled
scene3.title: When you're not sure where to pick up in the next session
scene3.quote:
"The notes are there —

but I still have to go back and re-read everything to find my place."

motionCaption: In every case, the pieces stay disconnected — integrating, reviewing, and linking them is still left to the counselor
